SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeWriter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractWriter
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeWriter
public class ExecutionNodeWriter extends AbstractWriter
Allows to persistent selected properties of IExecutionNodes as XML file. Such files can be read via an ExecutionNodeReader instance.
See Also:
  • ExecutionNodeReader

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    appendBlockCompletions(int level, IExecutionBlockStartNode<?> node, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the block completion entries to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendCallStack(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, boolean saveCallStack, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the call stack entries if required to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendCallStateVariables(int level, IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<?> node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the contained IExecutionVariables to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendChildren(int childLevel, IExecutionNode<?> parent, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the child nodes to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendCompletedBlocks(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the completed block entries to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendConstraint(int level, IExecutionConstraint constraint, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the given IExecutionConstraint with its children to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendConstraints(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the contained IExecutionConstraints to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendConstraints(int level, IExecutionValue value, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the contained IExecutionConstraints to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionBlockContract(int level, IExecutionAuxiliaryContract node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionAuxiliaryContract into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionBranchCondition(int level, IExecutionBranchCondition node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionBranchCondition into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionBranchStatement(int level, IExecutionBranchStatement node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionLoopCondition into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn(int level, IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionJoin(int level, IExecutionJoin node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionJoin into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionLoopCondition(int level, IExecutionLoopCondition node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionLoopCondition into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionLoopInvariant(int level, IExecutionLoopInvariant node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionLoopInvariant into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionLoopStatement(int level, IExecutionLoopStatement node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionLoopStatement into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionMethodCall(int level, IExecutionMethodCall node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionMethodCall into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionMethodReturn(int level, IExecutionMethodReturn node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionMethodReturn into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionMethodReturnValue(int level, IExecutionMethodReturnValue returnValue, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionMethodReturnValue into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionNode(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionNode into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionOperationContract(int level, IExecutionOperationContract node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionOperationContract into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionStart(int level, IExecutionStart node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionStart into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionStatement(int level, IExecutionStatement node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionStatement into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendExecutionTermination(int level, IExecutionTermination node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Converts the given IExecutionTermination into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendMethodReturns(int level, IExecutionMethodCall node, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the method return entries to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendOutgoingLink(int level, IExecutionLink link, StringBuilder sb)
    appends outgoing links to the given StringBuilder
    protected void
    appendOutgoingLinks(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, StringBuilder sb)
    appends outgoing links to the given StringBuilder
    protected void
    appendTerminations(int level, IExecutionStart node, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the termination entries to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendValue(int level, IExecutionValue value, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the given IExecutionValue with its children to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendValues(int level, IExecutionVariable variable, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the contained IExecutionValues to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendVariable(int level, IExecutionVariable variable, boolean saveConstraints, String tagName, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the given IExecutionVariable with its children to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    appendVariables(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the contained IExecutionVariables to the given StringBuilder.
    protected String
    computePath(IExecutionNode<?> node)
    Computes the path from the root of the symbolic execution tree to the given IExecutionNode.
    String
    toXML(IExecutionNode<?> node, String encoding, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints)
    Converts the given IExecutionNode into XML.
    void
    write(IExecutionNode<?> node, String encoding, File file, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints)
    Writes the given IExecutionNode as XML file.
    void
    write(IExecutionNode<?> node, String encoding, OutputStream out, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints)
    Writes the given IExecutionNode into the OutputStream.

    • TAG_OUTGOING_LINK

      public static final String TAG_OUTGOING_LINK
      Tag name to store one entry of IExecutionNode.getOutgoingLinks().
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PATH_SEPARATOR

      public static final char PATH_SEPARATOR
      Character to separate path entries in attributes "path".
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • ExecutionNodeWriter

      public ExecutionNodeWriter()

  • Method Details

    • write

      public void write(IExecutionNode<?> node, String encoding, File file, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints) throws IOException, ProofInputException
      Writes the given IExecutionNode as XML file.
      Parameters:
      node - The IExecutionNode to save.
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      file - The File to save to.
      saveVariables - Save variables?
      saveCallStack - Save method call stack?
      saveReturnValues - Save method return values?
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • write

      public void write(IExecutionNode<?> node, String encoding, OutputStream out, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints) throws IOException, ProofInputException
      Writes the given IExecutionNode into the OutputStream.
      Parameters:
      node - The IExecutionNode to save.
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      out - The OutputStream to save to. The OutputStream will be closed by this method.
      saveVariables - Save variables?
      saveCallStack - Save method call stack?
      saveReturnValues - Save method return values?
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • toXML

      public String toXML(IExecutionNode<?> node, String encoding, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints) throws ProofInputException
      Converts the given IExecutionNode into XML.
      Parameters:
      node - The IExecutionNode to convert.
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      saveVariables - Save variables?
      saveCallStack - Save method call stack?
      saveReturnValues - Save method return values?
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      Returns:
      The created XML content.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • appendExecutionNode

      protected void appendExecutionNode(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Converts the given IExecutionNode into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The current child level.
      node - The IExecutionNode to convert.
      saveVariables - Save variables?
      saveCallStack - Save method call stack?
      saveReturnValues - Save method return values?
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • appendExecutionBranchCondition

      protected void appendExecutionBranchCondition(int level, IExecutionBranchCondition node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Converts the given IExecutionBranchCondition into XML and appends it to the StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The current child level.
      node - The IExecutionBranchCondition to convert.
      saveVariables - Save variables?
      saveCallStack - Save method call stack?
      saveReturnValues - Save method return values?
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      protected void appendExecutionStart(int level, IExecutionStart node, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException

      saveCallStack - Save method call stack?

      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • appendTerminations

      protected void appendTerminations(int level, IExecutionStart node, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the termination entries to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level of the children.
      node - The IExecutionStart which provides the termination entries.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendConstraints

      protected void appendConstraints(int level, IExecutionValue value, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Appends the contained IExecutionConstraints to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      value - The IExecutionValue which provides the IExecutionConstraints.
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      node - The IExecutionNode which provides the IExecutionConstraints.
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • appendConstraint

      protected void appendConstraint(int level, IExecutionConstraint constraint, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Appends the given IExecutionConstraint with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      constraint - The IExecutionConstraint to append.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • appendVariable

      protected void appendVariable(int level, IExecutionVariable variable, boolean saveConstraints, String tagName, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Appends the given IExecutionVariable with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      variable - The IExecutionVariable to append.
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      tagName - The tag name to store an IExecutionVariable.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      variable - The IExecutionVariable which provides the IExecutionValues.
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      protected void appendValue(int level, IExecutionValue value, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Appends the given IExecutionValue with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      value - The IExecutionValue to append.
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • appendChildren

      protected void appendChildren(int childLevel, IExecutionNode<?> parent, boolean saveVariables, boolean saveCallStack, boolean saveReturnValues, boolean saveConstraints, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Appends the child nodes to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      childLevel - The level of the children.
      parent - The parent IExecutionNode which provides the children.
      saveVariables - Save variables?
      saveCallStack - Save method call stack?
      saveReturnValues - Save method return values?
      saveConstraints - Save constraints?
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • appendOutgoingLinks

      protected void appendOutgoingLinks(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, StringBuilder sb)
      appends outgoing links to the given StringBuilder
      Parameters:
      level - the int specifying indentation level
      node - the IExecutionNode whose outgoing links are to be reported
      sb - the StringBuilder with the resulting text description

    • appendOutgoingLink

      protected void appendOutgoingLink(int level, IExecutionLink link, StringBuilder sb)
      appends outgoing links to the given StringBuilder
      Parameters:
      level - the int specifying indentation level
      link - the outgoing IExecutionLink to be reported
      sb - the StringBuilder with the resulting text description

    • appendCallStack

      protected void appendCallStack(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, boolean saveCallStack, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the call stack entries if required to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level of the children.
      node - The IExecutionNode which provides the call stack.
      saveCallStack - Defines if the call stack should be saved or not.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendMethodReturns

      protected void appendMethodReturns(int level, IExecutionMethodCall node, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the method return entries to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level of the children.
      node - The IExecutionMethodCall which provides the call stack.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendCompletedBlocks

      protected void appendCompletedBlocks(int level, IExecutionNode<?> node, StringBuilder sb) throws ProofInputException
      Appends the completed block entries to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level of the children.
      node - The IExecutionNode which provides the block entries.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

    • appendBlockCompletions

      protected void appendBlockCompletions(int level, IExecutionBlockStartNode<?> node, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the block completion entries to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level of the children.
      node - The IExecutionBlockStartNode which provides the completed blocks.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • computePath

      protected String computePath(IExecutionNode<?> node)
      Computes the path from the root of the symbolic execution tree to the given IExecutionNode.
      Parameters:
      node - The IExecutionNode to compute path to.
      Returns:
      The computed path.
